577 | pub type ScoreValue = f64;
 578 | 
 579 | #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq)]
 580 | pub struct ScoreMetrics {
 581 |     pub required_evidence_recall: ScoreValue,
 582 |     pub evidence_precision: ScoreValue,
 583 |     pub irrelevant_material_ratio: ScoreValue,
 584 |     pub turns_to_readiness: u32,
 585 |     pub reread_count: u32,
 586 |     pub post_readiness_drift_turns: u32,
 587 | }
 588 |
